summary: Tested payment method removal (MTN Cash, Syriatel Cash) and city field visibility for registration page. Fixed minor issue where city field was visible when clicking seller button before selecting seller type.

minor.issue: External URL (trendsyria.app) returns cached response with syriatel_cash. Local backend (127.0.0.1:8001) returns correct response without syriatel_cash. This is a CDN/proxy caching issue outside the codebase.

action_items: CDN/proxy cache may need to be cleared for trendsyria.app to reflect backend changes
critical_code_review_comments: CheckoutPage.js PAYMENT_METHODS array correctly contains only: wallet, bank_card (coming soon), shamcash, bank_account - NO syriatel_cash or mtn_cash
auth.py valid_types for seller/delivery payment accounts correctly contains only: shamcash, bank_account
payment_providers.py PaymentManager.get_payment_status() correctly returns only: shamcash, bank_account, bank_card
AuthPages.js RegisterPage correctly shows city field only for buyer user_type
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/AuthPages.js - Fixed handleSellerClick to set user_type='seller' immediately to hide city field
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment methods verified: only wallet, shamcash, bank_account, bank_card (coming soon) are available. MTN Cash and Syriatel Cash have been removed. City field in registration page is only shown for buyer type. External URL may have cached old API response.

registration_city_field_buyer.details: City field is correctly shown for buyer user type

registration_city_field_seller.details: City field is correctly hidden for seller user type (after fix)

registration_city_field_delivery.details: City field is correctly hidden for delivery user type

payment_v2_status_no_syriatel.details: Local backend /api/payment/v2/status does not include syriatel_cash

payment_v2_status_no_mtn.details: Local backend /api/payment/v2/status does not include mtn_cash

checkout_payment_methods.details: CheckoutPage.js PAYMENT_METHODS array contains only: wallet, bank_card, shamcash, bank_account

seller_valid_payment_types.details: auth.py valid_types contains only: shamcash, bank_account
